name: getImageDescription
description: Analyze and describe an image via vision AI. Always execute a fresh analysis for each request — never reuse descriptions from previous calls or conversation history. If a previous call failed, retry with the same imageUrl. Provide a public HTTP/HTTPS image URL. The optional 'prompt' focuses the analysis on specific aspects.

prompt.description: Optional instruction for what to focus on (style, objects, text, layout, etc.).

imageUrl.description: Public image URL (http/https) to analyze. Legacy alias: imageURL.
